core_misconception.description: Player treats the visible given part as the answer, or chooses a number that looks small or familiar, instead of reasoning about what missing part combines with the given part to make the total.

forbidden_scope: one number bond per round in this first real run
the total must remain visible at all times
the given part must remain visible at all times
answer choices must all be plausible small numbers, not obviously wrong distractors
no timer pressure in this first real run
no scoring layer in this first real run
wrong answers must not punish the player; they should only trigger a retry cue

This file was derived from existing artifacts that pre-date Package 10; it must be reviewed before being treated as authoritative operational state.
subject: math
success_metric: The player chooses the correct missing part on first commit, showing they understand the relationship between the whole and the two parts rather than guessing.

target_skill.description: Use part part whole reasoning to determine the missing addend within 10 instead of guessing from appearance or memorizing one surface pattern.
